_meta.scope: Controllers in the in-scope set for Switch/PC/Mac use cases (see design §12.1).
_meta.specSource: Each entry curated from the controller's marketing page on https://www.8bitdo.com/<slug>/, primarily the comparison tables embedded on the Pro 3, Ultimate 2 Wireless, Ultimate 2 Bluetooth, Ultimate 2C Wireless, Ultimate 2C Wired, SN30 Pro, Lite 2, and Pro 2 product pages.
_meta.missingPolicy: If a spec has booleanByDefault: true in specCatalog.ts and is OMITTED here, the comparison view treats it as 'this controller does not have this feature.' Otherwise omission means 'not listed by 8BitDo for this model.'
_meta.curatorTodos: Several rows on 8BitDo's comparison tables render as empty cells in the markdown fetch (checkmark icons), so a small number of boolean specs are conservatively omitted rather than guessed. Worth a second pass against the rendered marketing pages before shipping; see per-entry _curatorNotes.

8bitdo-pro-3.name: Pro 3
8bitdo-pro-3.tagline: Retro flagship with TMR sticks, Hall Effect triggers, swappable ABXY, and an integrated charging dock.

Layout.value: Switch layout (swappable magnetic ABXY: Switch or Xbox)

Polling Rate.value: D-input: BT 60-100Hz, Wired 100-200Hz; S-input: BT 60-200Hz, Wired/2.4G 125Hz; X-input: Wired/2.4G 250Hz

Triggers.value: Dual-mode: Linear Hall Effect / Non-linear micro-switch

8bitdo-pro-3._curatorNotes: 3.5mm Audio Jack and RGB Fire Ring rows are present in the on-page comparison table but rendered as empty cells; not mentioned in feature copy either way. Conservatively omitted (= 'no' in the comparison view per booleanByDefault).

8bitdo-pro-2-bluetooth-controller.name: Pro 2 (Hall Effect)
8bitdo-pro-2-bluetooth-controller.tagline: Previous-generation Pro flagship, now with Hall Effect sticks. Broadest platform support including Raspberry Pi.

Polling Rate.value: D-input: BT 60Hz, Wired 100Hz; S-input: BT 60-200Hz, Wired 100Hz; X-input: Wired 100Hz

8bitdo-pro-2-bluetooth-controller._curatorNotes: Per Pro 3 comparison table: Pro 2 does NOT have Fast Bumpers (L4/R4), Charging Dock, or RGB Fire Ring (those rows are Pro-3-only). Switch 2 support added via firmware update. Switch compatibility does not support HD rumble or amiibo scanning.

8bitdo-ultimate-2.name: Ultimate 2 Wireless
8bitdo-ultimate-2.tagline: Xbox-layout flagship for PC/Mac/SteamOS/Android. NOTE: does NOT support Nintendo Switch.

Triggers.value: Dual-mode: Linear Hall Effect / Non-linear tactile

8bitdo-ultimate-2._curatorNotes: Major naming hazard: 'Ultimate 2 Wireless' has NO Switch support, while 'Ultimate 2 Bluetooth' (a separate product) DOES. The comparison view should surface this asymmetry clearly in the Compatibility row. Battery capacity not listed on the page comparison table for this product.

8bitdo-ultimate-2-bluetooth-controller.name: Ultimate 2 Bluetooth
8bitdo-ultimate-2-bluetooth-controller.tagline: Switch-layout flagship for Switch + PC. Counterpart to the (PC-only) Ultimate 2 Wireless.

Triggers.value: Dual-mode: Linear Hall Effect / Non-linear tactile

8bitdo-ultimate-2-bluetooth-controller._curatorNotes: Major naming hazard (see Ultimate 2 Wireless entry). Polling Rate row was present on the comparison table but rendered as empty — likely 2.4G/Wired 1000Hz to match the rest of the line. Confirm before shipping.

8bitdo-ultimate-2c-wireless-controller.name: Ultimate 2C Wireless (PC)
8bitdo-ultimate-2c-wireless-controller.tagline: Budget Xbox-layout controller for PC and Android. Hall Effect sticks at $29.99.
8bitdo-ultimate-2c-wireless-controller._curatorNotes: Per the 2C-wireless-vs-C-wireless comparison table: Pro Back Paddles, 3.5mm Audio Jack, 6-axis Motion, Vibration, Turbo, RGB Fire Ring, Charging Dock, Ultimate Software all rendered as empty in markdown. Treated as 'not present' (booleanByDefault). The page's feature copy confirms Hall Effect sticks+triggers, refined bumpers, custom mapping, mode switch — no mention of vibration/motion/RGB/dock.

8bitdo-ultimate-2c-wired-controller.name: Ultimate 2C Wired
8bitdo-ultimate-2c-wired-controller.tagline: Cheapest entry, wired-only. Hall Effect sticks at $19.99.
8bitdo-ultimate-2c-wired-controller._curatorNotes: Same pattern as 2C Wireless — all premium features (back paddles, motion, vibration, turbo, RGB, audio jack) are absent from the comparison table and feature copy; treated as not present. No battery section since it's wired-only.

8bitdo-sn30-pro-bluetooth-gamepad.name: SN30 Pro (Hall Effect)
8bitdo-sn30-pro-bluetooth-gamepad.tagline: SNES-style retro flagship, now with Hall Effect sticks. Broad platform support including Raspberry Pi.
8bitdo-sn30-pro-bluetooth-gamepad._curatorNotes: Older product, no embedded comparison table on its marketing page — specs above come from the page's hero/feature copy ('Hall Effect joysticks', 'rumble vibration', 'motion controls', 'wireless bluetooth', 'rechargeable battery', 'USB-C connector'). Battery capacity, polling rate, Ultimate Software support, and back paddles all unclear from the page; left out rather than guessed. Switch 2 support added via firmware update. Switch compatibility doesn't support HD rumble or amiibo.

8bitdo-lite-2-bluetooth-gamepad-for-swit.name: Lite 2
8bitdo-lite-2-bluetooth-gamepad-for-swit.tagline: Ultra-portable, fully-featured small-form-factor controller. Made for 2D games and travel.

6-axis Motion Control.value: Yes, but only in S (Switch) mode

Vibration.value: Yes, but only in S (Switch) mode (no HD rumble on Switch)

8bitdo-lite-2-bluetooth-gamepad-for-swit._curatorNotes: Does NOT officially support Windows/PC directly per the 8bitdo.com page (Switch, Android, Apple, Raspberry Pi only). Some users report D-input working with PC via Bluetooth but it's unsupported. Ultimate Software is not in its supported-devices list. For Switch+PC+Mac users, this controller MISSES PC support.

8bitdo-64-bluetooth-controller-funtastic.name: 8BitDo 64 (Funtastic)
8bitdo-64-bluetooth-controller-funtastic.tagline: N64-inspired Bluetooth controller for the Analogue 3D and Switch, with Hall Effect sticks and a metal joystick ring.

8bitdo-64-controller-prototype-limited-e.name: 8BitDo 64 (Prototype)
8bitdo-64-controller-prototype-limited-e.tagline: Prototype-themed limited editions of the 64 Bluetooth controller; same hardware, transparent colourways.

8bitdo-64-2-4g-wireless-controller.name: 8BitDo 64 2.4G
8bitdo-64-2-4g-wireless-controller.tagline: 2.4G wireless N64 controller for the original Nintendo 64 console and Analogue 3D, with Hall Effect stick and memory function.

8bitdo-ultimate-2-wireless-controller-ho.name: Ultimate 2 Wireless (Honkai: Star Rail – Evernight)
8bitdo-ultimate-2-wireless-controller-ho.tagline: Officially-licensed Honkai: Star Rail edition of the Ultimate 2 Wireless. PC/Mac/SteamOS/Android — no Switch support.

8bitdo-ultimate-2-wuchang.name: Ultimate 2 Wireless (WUCHANG: Fallen Feathers)
8bitdo-ultimate-2-wuchang.tagline: WUCHANG: Fallen Feathers edition of the Ultimate 2 Wireless (PC/Android).

ultimate-2-bluetooth-nes-40th.name: Ultimate 2 Bluetooth (NES 40th)
ultimate-2-bluetooth-nes-40th.tagline: NES 40th Anniversary edition of the Ultimate 2 Bluetooth. Switch + PC, plus original NES via the bundled Retro Receiver.

ultimate-2c-black-myth-wukong.name: Ultimate 2C (Black Myth: Wukong)
ultimate-2c-black-myth-wukong.tagline: Black Myth: Wukong edition of the Ultimate 2C. Budget Hall Effect controller for PC and Android.

8bitdo-sn30-wireless-gamepad-for-origina.name: 8BitDo SN30 2.4G
8bitdo-sn30-wireless-gamepad-for-origina.tagline: 2.4G wireless SNES/SFC-style pad for the original Super NES, Super Famicom and Analogue Super Nt (USB on Switch/PC).

Connectivity.value: 2.4G (SNES / SFC / Super Nt); Wired USB (Switch / Windows)

n30-2-4g.name: 8BitDo N30 2.4G
n30-2-4g.tagline: 2.4G wireless NES-style pad for the original NES, Famicom (HVC-101) and Analogue Nt / Nt Mini.

8bitdo-ultimate-mini-wired-controller-fo.name: Ultimate Mini Wired Controller for Xbox
8bitdo-ultimate-mini-wired-controller-fo.tagline: Compact officially-licensed Xbox wired controller with Hall Effect sticks/triggers, impulse triggers and an RGB Fire Ring.

8bitdo-arcade-controller.name: 8BitDo Arcade Controller
8bitdo-arcade-controller.tagline: Leverless all-button arcade controller with Kailh Wizard low-profile switches, hot-swappable PCB and SOCD cleaning.

8bitdo-arcade-controller-transparent-pur.name: 8BitDo Arcade Controller (Transparent Purple)
8bitdo-arcade-controller-transparent-pur.tagline: Signature Edition arcade controller with Kailh Purple Glede linear switches (Vxbao & Zhen collaboration).

8bitdo-arcade-controller-for-xbox.name: 8BitDo Arcade Controller for Xbox
8bitdo-arcade-controller-for-xbox.tagline: Officially-licensed Xbox leverless arcade controller with RGB lighting, Kailh Wizard switches and a 3.5mm jack.

8bitdo-ultimate-mobile-gaming-controller.name: Ultimate Mobile Gaming Controller
8bitdo-ultimate-mobile-gaming-controller.tagline: Telescopic Android phone controller with Hall Effect sticks/triggers, back paddles and Ultimate Software support.

ultimate-mobile-gaming-controller-xbox-e.name: Ultimate Mobile Gaming Controller (Xbox Edition)
ultimate-mobile-gaming-controller-xbox-e.tagline: Telescopic mobile controller for iOS/Android with Xbox Cloud Gaming support and Hall Effect sticks/triggers.

8bitdo-m30-wired-controller-for-xbox.name: M30 Wired Controller for Xbox
8bitdo-m30-wired-controller-for-xbox.tagline: Sega Genesis / Mega Drive-style 6-button fighting pad, officially licensed for Xbox, with on-the-fly profiles.

Mode Switch.value: Button-layout switch; left joystick / D-pad switch

8bitdo-ultimate-3e-controller-for-xbox.name: Ultimate 3E Controller for Xbox
8bitdo-ultimate-3e-controller-for-xbox.tagline: Officially-licensed Xbox flagship with TMR sticks, impulse triggers, swappable magnetic faceplate and joystick modules.

Layout.value: Xbox layout (swappable D-pad / ABXY / joystick modules)

ultimate-3-controller-for-xbox-lavender-.name: Ultimate 3 Controller for Xbox (Lavender Dusk)
ultimate-3-controller-for-xbox-lavender-.tagline: Officially-licensed Xbox controller with TMR sticks, Force Ring adjustable joystick tension and impulse triggers.

8bitdo-lite-se-2-4g-wireless-controller-.name: Lite SE 2.4G Wireless Controller for Xbox
8bitdo-lite-se-2-4g-wireless-controller-.tagline: Accessibility-focused Xbox controller with low-resistance buttons, a unified face-button layout and bundled Super Buttons.

8bitdo-pro-2-bluetooth-special-edition.name: Pro 2 (Special Edition)
8bitdo-pro-2-bluetooth-special-edition.tagline: Special-edition colourways of the Hall Effect Pro 2, with broad platform support and on-the-fly profiles.

8bitdo-sn30-pro-limited-edition.name: SN30 Pro (Space Gray Limited Edition)
8bitdo-sn30-pro-limited-edition.tagline: Zinc-alloy wired SN30 Pro limited edition for Switch and Windows.
